Package utp.citas.citas.repository

Interface ReporteAfluenciaRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Cita,Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Cita,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Cita,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Cita,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Cita,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Cita>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Cita,Long>
@Repository public interface ReporteAfluenciaRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Cita,Long>

    Method
    Description
    List<Object[]>
    obtenerAfluenciaRaw()

    Methods inherited from interface org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor

  • Method Details

    • obtenerAfluenciaRaw

      @Query(value="SELECT v.dia_semana AS diaSemana, v.turno AS turno, v.total_citas AS totalCitas, v.ingresos_turno AS ingresosTurno, (SELECT STRING_AGG(DISTINCT e.nombre, \', \') FROM citas c JOIN doctores d ON c.id_doctor = d.id_doctor JOIN especialidades e ON d.id_especialidad = e.id_especialidad WHERE c.estado != \'CANCELADA\' AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM c.fecha_cita) = CASE v.dia_semana WHEN \'Domingo\' THEN 0 WHEN \'Lunes\' THEN 1 WHEN \'Martes\' THEN 2 WHEN \'Mi\u00c3\u00a9rcoles\' THEN 3 WHEN \'Jueves\' THEN 4 WHEN \'Viernes\' THEN 5 WHEN \'S\u00c3\u00a1bado\' THEN 6 END AND ( (v.turno LIKE \'Ma\u00c3\u00b1ana%\' AND c.hora_cita < \'12:00:00\') OR (v.turno LIKE \'Tarde%\' AND c.hora_cita >= \'12:00:00\') ) ) AS especialidades FROM public.vista_reporte_afluencia v ORDER BY CASE v.dia_semana WHEN \'Lunes\' THEN 1 WHEN \'Martes\' THEN 2 WHEN \'Mi\u00c3\u00a9rcoles\' THEN 3 WHEN \'Jueves\' THEN 4 WHEN \'Viernes\' THEN 5 WHEN \'S\u00c3\u00a1bado\' THEN 6 WHEN \'Domingo\' THEN 7 END, v.turno DESC", nativeQuery=true) List<Object[]> obtenerAfluenciaRaw()
